action.create_qortal_account: create your Qortal account by clicking <next>NEXT</next> below.
action.enter_amount: please enter an amount greater than 0
action.insert_name_address: please insert a name or address

error.address_not_existing: address does not exist on blockchain
error.invalid_uint8: the Uint8ArrayData you've submitted is invalid
error.read_blob_base64: failed to read the Blob as a base64-encoded string

generic.block_list_intro: Add a Qortal name or address to block them. Addresses affect transaction handling; blocking a name hides their data across the Hub.
generic.blocked_addresses: blocked addresses- blocks processing of txs
generic.blocked_addresses_hint: Blocks processing related to transactions from these addresses.
generic.blocked_names_hint: These names are blocked for QDN / Hub data and social features.
generic.choose_block: choose 'block txs' or 'all' to block chat messages
generic.last_encryption_date: last encryption date: {{ date }} by {{ name }}
generic.no_blocked_users: Nobody is blocked yet. Add an address or name above when you want to mute them.
generic.insert_name_address: Please enter a Qortal name or address to start a private conversation.
generic.no_minimum_length: there is no minimum length requirement
generic.select_publish_to_update_from: select which publish to update from (latest first)
generic.confirm_publish_group_secret_key_body: Re-encrypt and publish the group secret key using the selected publish? This will use a small amount of QORT for the transaction.
generic.publishing_key: reminder: After publishing the key, it will take a couple of minutes for it to appear. Please just wait.
generic.seedphrase_notice: a <seed>SEEDPHRASE</seed> has been randomly generated in the background.
generic.turn_local_node: please turn on your local node
generic.type_seed: type or paste in your seed-phrase

success.reencrypted_secret_key: successfully re-encrypted secret key. It may take a couple of minutes for the changes to propagate. Refresh the group in 5 mins.

tips.additional_wallet: use this option to connect additional Qortal wallets you've already made, in order to login with them afterwards. You will need access to your backup JSON file in order to do so.
tips.qortal_account: an account is how you will login to the Qortal User Interface. It shows a public address and protects a private address. Every transaction you make is linked to your account, and this is where you manage all your QORT and other tradeable cryptocurrencies on Qortal. An account has no affiliation to your biological or legal identity. You can have more than one account.
tips.existing_account: already have a Qortal account? Enter your secret backup phrase here to access it. This phrase is one of the ways to recover your account.
tips.key_encrypt_admin: this key is to encrypt ADMIN related content. Only admins would see content encrypted with it.
tips.key_encrypt_group: this key is to encrypt GROUP related content. This is the only one used in this UI as of now. All group members will be able to see content encrypted with this key.
tips.new_account: creating an account means creating a new public and private address to start using Qortal. Once you have made your account, you can start doing things like obtaining some QORT, buying a name and avatar, publishing videos and blogs, and much more.
tips.safe_place: save your account in a place where you will remember it!
tips.view_seedphrase: if you wish to VIEW THE SEEDPHRASE, click the word 'SEEDPHRASE' in this text. Seedphrases are used to generate the private key for your Qortal account. For security by default, seedphrases are NOT displayed unless specifically chosen.

create_wallet.success_ready_hub: you’re now ready to enter Hub.
create_wallet.success_backup_before_hub: back up your encrypted wallet before entering Hub.
create_wallet.backup_encrypted_notice: this backup is encrypted with your wallet password.
create_wallet.seed_subtitle: this can recover your account. saving your seedphrase is optional. your encrypted wallet backup comes next which is the recommended way to recover your account.
create_wallet.seed_warning: never share this. anyone with it can access your account. for daily safekeeping, use the encrypted wallet backup after creation.
create_wallet.password_subtitle: this password protects your account on this device.

import_account.title: import account
import_account.subtitle: choose how you want to restore your account.

backup_wallet_modal.subtitle: download a local wallet file so you can restore this account later.
backup_wallet_modal.info_note: this exports a wallet file locally on your device. keep it stored somewhere safe.
backup_wallet_modal.keep_password_in_export: keep the current password in the exported wallet file
backup_wallet_modal.error_no_active_wallet: no active wallet was found for backup.
backup_wallet_modal.error_unable_to_create_backup: unable to create the wallet backup.

wallet_errors.unable_to_save_backup: unable to save this wallet backup.
wallet_errors.unable_to_prepare_backup: unable to prepare this wallet backup.
wallet_errors.account_not_found: this saved account could not be found. choose another account or restore this wallet from a backup.
wallet_errors.account_incomplete: this saved account looks incomplete or damaged. choose another account or restore this wallet from a backup.
wallet_errors.invalid_security_data: this saved account contains invalid wallet security data. choose another account or restore this wallet from a backup.
wallet_errors.missing_encrypted_seed: this saved account is missing its encrypted seed (the locked wallet data needed to unlock it). choose another account or restore this wallet from a backup.
wallet_errors.missing_field: this saved account is missing its {{field}}. choose another account or restore this wallet from a backup.

field.encryptedSeed: encrypted seed (the locked wallet data needed to unlock it)
